'''fashobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oolite|oolite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oolite|oolite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fashobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshebeth|fæshebeth]] || [[word:fæshebej|fæshebej]] || [[word:fæshebesh|fæshebesh]] || [[word:fæshebe|fæshebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashoshoboth|fashoshoboth]] || [[word:fashoshoboj|fashoshoboj]] || [[word:fashoshobosh|fashoshobosh]] || [[word:fashoshobo|fashoshobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashoboth|fashoboth]] || [[word:fashoboj|fashoboj]] || [[word:fashobosh|fashobosh]] || [[word:fashobo|fashobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashofboth|fashofboth]] || [[word:fashofboj|fashofboj]] || [[word:fashofbosh|fashofbosh]] || [[word:fashofbof|fashofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashobotho|fashobotho]] || [[word:fashobojo|fashobojo]] || [[word:fashobosho|fashobosho]] || [[word:fashoboko|fashoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashoboth|fashoboth]] || [[word:fashoboj|fashoboj]] || [[word:fashobosh|fashobosh]] || [[word:fashobo|fashobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashobothol|fashobothol]] || [[word:fashobojol|fashobojol]] || [[word:fashoboshol|fashoboshol]] || [[word:fashobokol|fashobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashobothotho|fashobothotho]] || [[word:fashobojojo|fashobojojo]] || [[word:fashoboshosho|fashoboshosho]] || [[word:fashoboko|fashoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashobothon|fashobothon]] || [[word:fashobojon|fashobojon]] || [[word:fashoboshon|fashoboshon]] || [[word:fashobokon|fashobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashobothoro|fashobothoro]] || [[word:fashobojoro|fashobojoro]] || [[word:fashoboshoro|fashoboshoro]] || [[word:fashobokoro|fashobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
